The road facilities are here are very developed.Alll essential needs shops,schools are easily located near to our locality.We can easily go to market from our locality and buy groceries Vegetables etc. Very innovative and modern facilities such as cab booking are easily booked.Our city is also connected with metro.

pointers.title: Suresh Sharma Nagar, a mid-segment locality in Bareilly, offers mixed housing inventory
Bareilly Bypass Road, Dohra Road and Pilibhit Road connect the locale to other parts of Uttar Pradesh
Parsakhera Industrial Area, one of the major employment hubs, is about 25 km from the locality via National Highway 530
Bareilly Railway Station is within 9 km radius of the locale via Pilibhit Bypass Road
Affordable rentals and good location are some of the factors that make tenants choose this locality
Some of the popular hospitals within 6 km radius are Om Shaanti Hospital and Gurunanak Hospital
Bareilly Airport is about 10 km from the locality via National Highway 30
Prominent malls such as Phoneix United Mall and Amrapali Mall are within 10 km radius
SR International School (3 km) and Madhavrao Scindhia School (6 km) are some renowned schools near the locality
Renowned tourist attractions such as Fun City and Panchal Museum are within 5 km radius of the locale
The condition of roads in and around Suresh Sharma Nagar is not up to the mark
